title: Upstream Under Attack
summary:
Main
The past few days have seen the conflict extend beyond chokepoint disruption into direct strikes on production and refining infrastructure across the Gulf. Following Israel's attack on Iran's South Pars gas field on Wednesday, Iran retaliated with drone and missile strikes on energy facilities in Qatar, the UAE, Saudi Arabia, and Kuwait. Qatar's Ras Laffan industrial complex was targeted, and Abu Dhabi's Habshan gas facility and Bab oil field were shut down.
